CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, "CREATE INDEX journal_entries_project_idx ON journal_entries(project_id, occurred_at DESC)", 0)

ArgumentListWrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_467_951_626, arrayOf("sync_state"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectAllSyncStates", "SELECT sync_state.project_uuid, sync_state.local_rev, sync_state.cloud_head_rev, sync_state.dirty, sync_state.self_contained, sync_state.lock_owner, sync_state.lock_expires, sync_state.last_pulled, sync_state.updated_at FROM sync_state")

ArgumentListWrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_850_581_817, arrayOf("sync_state"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectDirtyOldestFirst", "SELECT sync_state.project_uuid, sync_state.local_rev, sync_state.cloud_head_rev, sync_state.dirty, sync_state.self_contained, sync_state.lock_owner, sync_state.lock_expires, sync_state.last_pulled, sync_state.updated_at FROM sync_state WHERE dirty != 0 ORDER BY updated_at ASC, project_uuid ASC")
ArgumentListWrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_936_687_912, arrayOf("projects"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectAllProjectsForMigration", "SELECT id, path, parent_dir FROM projects")

ArgumentListWrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-680_691_159, arrayOf("projects"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectAllProjectIdsAndNames", "SELECT id, name FROM projects")

ArgumentListWrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(1_644_417_816, arrayOf("projects"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectDistinctKeys", "SELECT DISTINCT key FROM projects WHERE key IS NOT NULL ORDER BY key")

ArgumentListWrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(359_717_445, arrayOf("blob_cache"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "sumBlobCacheBytes", "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(size), 0) AS total FROM blob_cache")

ArgumentListWrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(56_804_403, arrayOf("projects"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectAllProjects", "SELECT projects.id, projects.path, projects.name, projects.parent_dir, projects.tempo, projects.time_sig_num, projects.time_sig_den, projects.key, projects.track_count, projects.audio_tracks, projects.midi_tracks, projects.return_tracks, projects.length_seconds, projects.live_version, projects.last_modified, projects.last_scanned, projects.file_hash, projects.is_archived, projects.color_tag, projects.notes, projects.effort_score, projects.effort_breakdown, projects.parse_status, projects.parse_error, projects.mac_paths_count, projects.has_project_info, projects.file_size_bytes, projects.is_missing, projects.last_seen, projects.stage_inferred, projects.stage_override, projects.has_local_bounce FROM projects WHERE is_archived = 0 ORDER BY last_modified DESC")

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE blob_cache ( | hash TEXT PRIMARY KEY, | size INTEGER NOT NULL, | last_used TEXT NOT NULL, | pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE journal_entries ( | id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, | occurred_at INTEGER NOT NULL, | actor TEXT NOT NULL, | action_type TEXT NOT NULL, | -- NOT NULL but intentionally no FK: audit entries outlive their project; projects.id is | -- AUTOINCREMENT so the int never gets reused, so a stale project_id stays meaningful. | project_id INTEGER NOT NULL, | payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}' |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE journal_entries ( | id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, | occurred_at INTEGER NOT NULL, | actor TEXT NOT NULL, | action_type TEXT NOT NULL, | -- NOT NULL but intentionally no FK: audit entries outlive their project; projects.id is | -- AUTOINCREMENT so the int never gets reused, so a stale project_id stays meaningful. | project_id INTEGER NOT NULL, | payload_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', | -- Denormalized project name captured at append time. Survives catalog rescans that drop or | -- reassign project ids â€” without this, the History UI has no way to render a name for an | -- orphaned entry beyond a "project #N" sentinel. Nullable for legacy rows written before v6. | project_name TEXT, | -- Denormalized project path captured at append time. Same survives-orphan reasoning as | -- project_name above: when the project_id stops resolving, ProjectDisplay's pathHint fallback | -- still has the original on-disk path to derive a name from. Nullable for legacy rows. | project_path TEXT |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE pending_uploads ( | hash TEXT PRIMARY KEY, | size INTEGER NOT NULL, | source_path TEXT NOT NULL, | enqueued_at TEXT NOT NULL, | attempts INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE project_identity ( | project_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, | uuid TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, | created_at TEXT NOT NULL |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE project_plugins ( | id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, | project_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, | plugin_name TEXT NOT NULL, | plugin_type TEXT NOT NULL, | track_name TEXT, | -- PR-T: 1 when the plugin file exists in one of the platform-default install dirs (or | -- when we couldn't normalize the name), 0 when the user's filesystem is missing it. Default | -- 1 so brand-new rows from the parser don't blink to "missing" before the presence probe | -- has actually walked the disk; the probe flips them to 0 if no match is found. | is_installed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE project_samples ( | id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, | project_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, | sample_path TEXT NOT NULL, | sample_hash TEXT, | is_missing INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | size_bytes INTEGER |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE project_tags ( | project_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, | tag_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES tags(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, | PRIMARY KEY (project_id, tag_id) |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE projects ( | id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, | path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, | name TEXT NOT NULL, | parent_dir TEXT NOT NULL, | tempo REAL, | time_sig_num INTEGER, | time_sig_den INTEGER, | key TEXT, | track_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | audio_tracks INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | midi_tracks INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | return_tracks INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | length_seconds REAL, | live_version TEXT, | last_modified REAL NOT NULL, | last_scanned REAL NOT NULL, | file_hash TEXT, | is_archived INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | color_tag INTEGER, | notes TEXT, | effort_score INTEGER, | effort_breakdown TEXT, | parse_status TEXT, | parse_error TEXT, | mac_paths_count INTEGER, | has_project_info INTEGER, | file_size_bytes INTEGER, | is_missing INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | last_seen REAL, | -- PR-R: stage classification. `stage_inferred` is rewritten on every successful scan from | -- StageInferrer.infer; `stage_override` is user-set via the per-row chip popup and wins on | -- read. `has_local_bounce` is the scan-time bounce-probe result, cached so PR-CC's library | -- health aggregate doesn't have to walk the filesystem. | stage_inferred TEXT, | stage_override TEXT, | has_local_bounce INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE proposal_acks ( | proposal_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, | status TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'approved' | 'rejected' | decided_at TEXT NOT NULL |) """.trimMargin(), 0)
Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE proposal_acks ( | proposal_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, | status TEXT NOT NULL, | decided_at TEXT NOT NULL |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE repair_acks ( | scope TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'mac_import' | 'missing_sample' | project_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, | payload TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', -- empty for mac_import; missing_path for missing_sample | acked_at TEXT NOT NULL, | PRIMARY KEY (scope, project_id, payload) |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE repair_acks ( | scope TEXT NOT NULL, | project_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, | payload TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', | acked_at TEXT NOT NULL, | PRIMARY KEY (scope, project_id, payload) |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE samples ( | id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, | path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, | filename TEXT NOT NULL, | size_bytes INTEGER NOT NULL, | mtime REAL NOT NULL, | parent_dir TEXT NOT NULL |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE snapshots ( | project_uuid TEXT NOT NULL, | rev INTEGER NOT NULL, | parent_rev INTEGER, | timestamp TEXT NOT NULL, | host_id TEXT NOT NULL, | kind TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(kind IN ('auto','named','branch')), | label TEXT, | manifest_path TEXT NOT NULL, | manifest_hash TEXT NOT NULL, | file_count INTEGER NOT NULL, | total_bytes INTEGER NOT NULL, | new_bytes INTEGER NOT NULL, | PRIMARY KEY (project_uuid, rev) |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE sync_state ( | project_uuid TEXT PRIMARY KEY, | local_rev INTEGER NOT NULL, | cloud_head_rev INTEGER NOT NULL, | dirty INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | self_contained INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, | lock_owner TEXT, | lock_expires TEXT, | last_pulled TEXT, | -- Epoch millis of the last write that touched this row. Drives drainOldestFirst() so the | -- background sync drain processes longest-pending dirty work first (FIFO fairness). | updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 |) """.trimMargin(), 0)
Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE TABLE tags ( | id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, | name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE projects_fts USING fts5( | name, parent_dir, plugin_names, sample_filenames, notes, | tokenize='porter unicode61' |) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |UPDATE journal_entries |SET project_name = (SELECT p.name FROM projects p WHERE p.id = journal_entries.project_id) |WHERE project_name IS NULL | AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = journal_entries.project_id) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogImpl.kt:CatalogImpl.Schema$(null, """ |UPDATE journal_entries |SET project_path = (SELECT p.path FROM projects p WHERE p.id = journal_entries.project_id) |WHERE project_path IS NULL | AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects p WHERE p.id = journal_entries.project_id) """.trimMargin(), 0)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_050_669_632, """ |INSERT INTO journal_entries(occurred_at, actor, action_type, project_id, payload_json, project_name, project_path) |VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 7)
Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_091_400_297, """ |INSERT OR REPLACE INTO repair_acks (scope, project_id, payload, acked_at) |VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 4)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_181_229_771, arrayOf("project_plugins", "projects"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectMissingPluginSummary", """ |SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pp.plugin_name || '|' || pp.plugin_type) AS missing_count, | COUNT(DISTINCT pp.project_id) AS affected_projects |FROM project_plugins pp |JOIN projects p ON p.id = pp.project_id |WHERE pp.is_installed = 0 AND p.is_archived = 0 """.trimMargin())

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_511_278_358, """ |INSERT OR REPLACE INTO sync_state (project_uuid, local_rev, cloud_head_rev, dirty, self_contained, updated_at) |VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 6)
Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_658_774_633, """ |UPDATE project_samples |SET sample_path = ?, is_missing = 0 |WHERE project_id = ? AND sample_path = ? """.trimMargin(), 3)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_716_120_608, """ |UPDATE projects |SET name = ?, | parent_dir = ?, | tempo = ?, | time_sig_num = ?, | time_sig_den = ?, | key = ?, | track_count = ?, | audio_tracks = ?, | midi_tracks = ?, | return_tracks = ?, | live_version = ?, | last_modified = ?, | last_scanned = ?, | parse_status = ?, | parse_error = ?, | mac_paths_count = ?, | effort_score = ?, | effort_breakdown = ?, | file_size_bytes = ? |WHERE path = ? """.trimMargin(), 20)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_932_854_116, arrayOf("projects", "project_samples"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectArchivedProjectsWithMissing", """ |SELECT p.id, p.path, p.name, p.parent_dir, p.tempo, p.time_sig_num, p.time_sig_den, p.key, p.track_count, p.audio_tracks, p.midi_tracks, p.return_tracks, p.length_seconds, p.live_version, p.last_modified, p.last_scanned, p.file_hash, p.is_archived, p.color_tag, p.notes, p.effort_score, p.effort_breakdown, p.parse_status, p.parse_error, p.mac_paths_count, p.has_project_info, p.file_size_bytes, p.is_missing, p.last_seen, p.stage_inferred, p.stage_override, p.has_local_bounce, | COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_samples ps | WHERE ps.project_id = p.id AND ps.is_missing = 1), 0) AS missing_sample_count |FROM projects p |WHERE p.is_archived = 1 |ORDER BY p.last_modified DESC """.trimMargin())

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-1_996_300_723, """ |INSERT OR REPLACE INTO projects (path, name, parent_dir, tempo, time_sig_num, time_sig_den, key, track_count, audio_tracks, midi_tracks, return_tracks, live_version, last_modified, last_scanned, parse_status, parse_error, mac_paths_count, effort_score, effort_breakdown, file_size_bytes) |VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 20)
Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-287_056_024, """ |INSERT OR IGNORE INTO project_identity (project_id, uuid, created_at) |VALUES (?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 3)
Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-296_426_123, """ |INSERT OR IGNORE INTO project_tags (project_id, tag_id) |SELECT ?, id FROM tags WHERE name = ? """.trimMargin(), 2)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-329_262_266, arrayOf("project_samples", "projects", "repair_acks"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "countMissingSamples", """ |SELECT COUNT(*) |FROM project_samples ps |JOIN projects p ON p.id = ps.project_id |WHERE ps.is_missing = 1 | AND p.is_archived = 0 | AND NOT EXISTS ( | SELECT 1 FROM repair_acks ra | WHERE ra.scope = 'missing_sample' | AND ra.project_id = ps.project_id | AND ra.payload = ps.sample_path | ) """.trimMargin())
Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-540_037_723, """ |INSERT OR REPLACE INTO samples (path, filename, size_bytes, mtime, parent_dir) |VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 5)
Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-663_429_659, """ |UPDATE project_samples |SET sample_path = ?, is_missing = 1 |WHERE project_id = ? AND sample_path = ? """.trimMargin(), 3)
Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-851_132_078, """ |INSERT OR REPLACE INTO proposal_acks (proposal_key, status, decided_at) |VALUES (?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 3)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-857_869_767, arrayOf("project_plugins", "projects"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectMissingPluginCoverage", """ |SELECT pp.plugin_name AS name, | pp.plugin_type AS type, | COUNT(DISTINCT pp.project_id) AS affected_projects |FROM project_plugins pp |JOIN projects p ON p.id = pp.project_id |WHERE pp.is_installed = 0 AND p.is_archived = 0 |GROUP BY pp.plugin_name, pp.plugin_type |ORDER BY affected_projects DESC, pp.plugin_name ASC """.trimMargin())

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-945_130_611, arrayOf("projects", "project_samples"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectAllProjectsWithMissing", """ |SELECT p.id, p.path, p.name, p.parent_dir, p.tempo, p.time_sig_num, p.time_sig_den, p.key, p.track_count, p.audio_tracks, p.midi_tracks, p.return_tracks, p.length_seconds, p.live_version, p.last_modified, p.last_scanned, p.file_hash, p.is_archived, p.color_tag, p.notes, p.effort_score, p.effort_breakdown, p.parse_status, p.parse_error, p.mac_paths_count, p.has_project_info, p.file_size_bytes, p.is_missing, p.last_seen, p.stage_inferred, p.stage_override, p.has_local_bounce, | COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_samples ps | WHERE ps.project_id = p.id AND ps.is_missing = 1), 0) AS missing_sample_count |FROM projects p |WHERE p.is_archived = 0 |ORDER BY p.last_modified DESC """.trimMargin())

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(-968_000_529, arrayOf("sync_state", "project_samples", "project_plugins", "projects", "project_identity"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectLibraryHealth", """ |SELECT | COUNT(*) AS total, | SUM(CASE WHEN s.dirty IS NOT NULL AND s.dirty = 0 AND s.local_rev = s.cloud_head_rev THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS synced, | SUM(CASE WHEN ms.missing_count IS NULL OR ms.missing_count = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sample_clean, | SUM(CASE WHEN mp.missing_count IS NULL OR mp.missing_count = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS plugin_installed, | SUM(CASE WHEN p.stage_inferred IS NULL OR p.stage_inferred != 'Stuck' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stage_not_stuck |FROM projects p |LEFT JOIN project_identity pi ON pi.project_id = p.id |LEFT JOIN sync_state s ON s.project_uuid = pi.uuid |LEFT JOIN ( | SELECT project_id, COUNT(*) AS missing_count | FROM project_samples | WHERE is_missing = 1 | GROUP BY project_id |) ms ON ms.project_id = p.id |LEFT JOIN ( | SELECT project_id, COUNT(*) AS missing_count | FROM project_plugins | WHERE is_installed = 0 | GROUP BY project_id |) mp ON mp.project_id = p.id |WHERE p.is_archived = 0 """.trimMargin())

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(1_382_644_361, """ |INSERT INTO snapshots (project_uuid, rev, parent_rev, timestamp, host_id, kind, label, manifest_path, manifest_hash, file_count, total_bytes, new_bytes) |VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 12)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(1_468_320_824, """ |INSERT INTO sync_state (project_uuid, local_rev, cloud_head_rev, dirty, self_contained, updated_at) |VALUES (?, 0, ?, 0, 0, ?) |ON CONFLICT(project_uuid) DO UPDATE SET cloud_head_rev = ?, updated_at = ? """.trimMargin(), 5)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(1_527_216_564, """ |INSERT INTO projects (path, name, parent_dir, tempo, time_sig_num, time_sig_den, key, track_count, audio_tracks, midi_tracks, return_tracks, live_version, last_modified, last_scanned, parse_status, parse_error, mac_paths_count, effort_score, effort_breakdown, file_size_bytes) |VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 20)
Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(1_590_593_884, """ |INSERT OR REPLACE INTO project_identity (project_id, uuid, created_at) |VALUES (?, ?, ?) """.trimMargin(), 3)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(233_103_807, arrayOf("project_tags", "tags"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectAllProjectTagPairs", """ |SELECT pt.project_id, t.name FROM project_tags pt |JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id |ORDER BY pt.project_id, t.name """.trimMargin())

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries$(2_093_407_078, arrayOf("projects", "repair_acks"), driver, "Catalog.sq", "selectMacImportProjects", """ |SELECT id, path, name, parent_dir, mac_paths_count, has_project_info |FROM projects |WHERE is_archived = 0 | AND (COALESCE(mac_paths_count, 0) > 0 OR COALESCE(has_project_info, 1) = 0) | AND id NOT IN (SELECT project_id FROM repair_acks WHERE scope = 'mac_import') |ORDER BY mac_paths_count DESC, last_modified DESC """.trimMargin())

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectArchiveCandidatesQuery$(255_013_546, """ |SELECT id, path, name, parent_dir, last_modified |FROM projects |WHERE is_archived = 0 | AND color_tag IS NULL | AND last_modified < ? |ORDER BY last_modified ASC |LIMIT 50 """.trimMargin(), mapper, 1)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectJournalForProjectQuery$(65_546_655, """ |SELECT journal_entries.id, journal_entries.occurred_at, journal_entries.actor, journal_entries.action_type, journal_entries.project_id, journal_entries.payload_json, journal_entries.project_name, journal_entries.project_path FROM journal_entries WHERE project_id = ? |ORDER BY occurred_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT ? """.trimMargin(), mapper, 2)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectMissingSamplesQuery$(1_074_861_515, """ |SELECT ps.project_id, ps.sample_path, ps.size_bytes AS sample_size, | p.path AS project_path, p.name AS project_name |FROM project_samples ps |JOIN projects p ON p.id = ps.project_id |WHERE ps.is_missing = 1 | AND p.is_archived = 0 | AND NOT EXISTS ( | SELECT 1 FROM repair_acks ra | WHERE ra.scope = 'missing_sample' | AND ra.project_id = ps.project_id | AND ra.payload = ps.sample_path | ) |ORDER BY p.last_modified DESC |LIMIT ? """.trimMargin(), mapper, 1)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectProjectByIdWithMissingQuery$(943_874_109, """ |SELECT p.id, p.path, p.name, p.parent_dir, p.tempo, p.time_sig_num, p.time_sig_den, p.key, p.track_count, p.audio_tracks, p.midi_tracks, p.return_tracks, p.length_seconds, p.live_version, p.last_modified, p.last_scanned, p.file_hash, p.is_archived, p.color_tag, p.notes, p.effort_score, p.effort_breakdown, p.parse_status, p.parse_error, p.mac_paths_count, p.has_project_info, p.file_size_bytes, p.is_missing, p.last_seen, p.stage_inferred, p.stage_override, p.has_local_bounce, | COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_samples ps | WHERE ps.project_id = p.id AND ps.is_missing = 1), 0) AS missing_sample_count |FROM projects p |WHERE p.id = ? """.trimMargin(), mapper, 1)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectProjectsUsingPluginQuery$(null, """ |SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.name, p.path, p.last_modified |FROM projects p |JOIN project_plugins pp ON pp.project_id = p.id |WHERE pp.plugin_name = ? | AND (? IS NULL OR pp.plugin_type ${ if (plugin_type == null) "IS" else "=" } ?) | AND (? IS NULL OR p.id ${ if (exclude_id == null) "IS NOT" else "!=" } ?) | AND p.is_archived = 0 |ORDER BY p.last_modified DESC """.trimMargin(), mapper, 5)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectSamplesByFilenameAndSizeQuery$(-801_971_175, """ |SELECT samples.id, samples.path, samples.filename, samples.size_bytes, samples.mtime, samples.parent_dir FROM samples WHERE filename = ? AND size_bytes = ? |ORDER BY mtime DESC LIMIT 5 """.trimMargin(), mapper, 2)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectSamplesByFilenameQuery$(-2_083_011_233, """ |SELECT samples.id, samples.path, samples.filename, samples.size_bytes, samples.mtime, samples.parent_dir FROM samples WHERE filename = ? |ORDER BY mtime DESC LIMIT 5 """.trimMargin(), mapper, 1)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectTagPairsForProjectsQuery$(null, """ |SELECT pt.project_id, t.name FROM project_tags pt |JOIN tags t ON t.id = pt.tag_id |WHERE pt.project_id IN $idsIndexes |ORDER BY pt.project_id, t.name """.trimMargin(), mapper, ids.size)

Wrapping:CatalogQueries.kt:CatalogQueries.SelectTagsForProjectQuery$(-1_073_375_983, """ |SELECT t.name FROM tags t |JOIN project_tags pt ON pt.tag_id = t.id |WHERE pt.project_id = ? |ORDER BY t.name """.trimMargin(), mapper, 1)
